style: clean bold cartoon, flat fills, thick #222222 outline, 64x64

monster_bandit.name: Bandit
monster_bandit.description: A bandit wearing a domino eye-mask.

monster_goblin_minion.name: Goblin Minion
monster_goblin_minion.description: A small green goblin with big ears and a fang.

monster_guard.name: Guard
monster_guard.description: A bareheaded town guard, stern, with an armored collar.

npc_frightened_traveller.name: Frightened Traveller
npc_frightened_traveller.description: A wide-eyed traveller in a hood.

npc_tavern_keeper.name: Tavern Keeper
npc_tavern_keeper.description: A human tavern keeper with a mustache and apron.

npc_wandering_sage.name: Wandering Sage
npc_wandering_sage.description: A grey-bearded sage with a circlet.

player_fighter_human.name: Human Fighter
player_fighter_human.description: A human fighter in a sleek sallet helm with a gorget.

player_rogue_woodelf.name: Wood Elf Rogue
player_rogue_woodelf.description: A wood elf female rogue in a hood.

player_wizard_highelf.name: High Elf Wizard
player_wizard_highelf.description: A bald high elf wizard with a long beard and a glowing arcane rune on the brow.

monster_cultist.name: Cultist
monster_cultist.description: A robed cultist in a peaked hood with two glowing red eyes.

monster_noble.name: Noble
monster_noble.description: A finely-dressed noble in a feathered cap.

monster_warrior_infantry.name: Warrior Infantry
monster_warrior_infantry.description: An armored infantry soldier in a nasal helm.

monster_kobold_warrior.name: Kobold Warrior
monster_kobold_warrior.description: A red-scaled draconic kobold warrior with horns and slit eyes, serving a red dragon.

monster_stirge.name: Stirge
monster_stirge.description: A winged blood-drinking stirge with a long proboscis.
